esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_used_bytes)),
    mem_max = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.jvm_memory_max_bytes))
  BY host.name
| WHERE mem_max > 0
| EVAL heap_pct = ROUND(used / mem_max * 100.0, 2)
// Threshold: alert when JVM memory utilization exceeds 85%
// Sustained high memory usage may lead to OutOfMemoryErrors
// Adjust threshold based on GC behavior and JVM tuning
| WHERE heap_pct > 85.0
| SORT heap_pct DESC
